title: Newegg Commerce H2 2025 Results and 2026 Earnings Guidance
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Investor Relations - Earnings Summary and Outlook.

H2 2025 Results: Financial Performance. Net sales increased 16.9% year-over-year to $1.44 billion (versus $1.24 billion in 2024). GMV rose 15.4% to $1.77 billion (compared to $1.53 billion in 2024). Gross profit grew to $168.5 million from $131.5 million year-over-year. Net loss narrowed significantly to $4.9 million, versus $43.3 million in 2024. Adjusted EBITDA improved to $24.8 million, versus a loss of $9.5 million in 2024.

Key Drivers: The company achieved double-digit year-over-year GMV growth, driven by strong demand for next-gen PC components and successful product launches, including NVIDIA GeForce 50 and AMD Radeon 9000 GPUs. Expansion included direct and marketplace businesses, supported by proactive inventory planning and successful promotional campaigns, notably a month-long Black Friday event.

2026 Guidance: Net sales: $1.23 billion to $1.47 billion. GMV: $1.50 billion to $1.79 billion. Gross profit: $144.0 million to $170.9 million. Net income: $6.1 million to $15.7 million. Adjusted EBITDA: $10.0 million to $19.6 million.

Next Earnings Date: H1 2026 on August 21, 2026.
